inputs.label: Roof Pitch
inputs.businessContext: Angle of the roof slope measured from horizontal.

businessContext_i18n.en: Angle of the roof slope measured from horizontal.
businessContext_i18n.de: Winkel der Dachneigung, gemessen von der Horizontalen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle de la pente du toit mesuré par rapport à l'horizontale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ángulo de la pendiente del techo medido desde la horizontal.

inputs.label: Building Width
inputs.businessContext: Total external width of the building (span).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total external width of the building (span).

inputs.label: Overhang
inputs.businessContext: Horizontal projection of the rafter beyond the wall plate.

businessContext_i18n.en: Horizontal projection of the rafter beyond the wall plate.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mertek duvar levhası dışındaki yatay izdüşümü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Horizontaler Überstand des Sparrens über die Mauerlatte hinaus.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Projection horizontale du chevron au-delà du mur de façade.
businessContext_i18n.es: Proyección horizontal de la viga más allá de la placa de pared.

inputs.label: Rafter Depth
inputs.businessContext: Vertical depth of the rafter board (for birdsmouth calculations).

businessContext_i18n.en: Vertical depth of the rafter board (for birdsmouth calculations).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mertek levhasının düşey derinliği (kuş gagası hesaplamaları için).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur verticale de la planche de chevron (pour les calculs d'encoche).
businessContext_i18n.es: Profundidad vertical de la tabla de la viga (para cálculos de boca de pájaro).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
